workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: I need you to process this escalation email from Quantum Analytics. Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-04 11:53 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Quantum Analytics consumption trend

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 15:51 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Quantum Analytics

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-25 11:15 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Quantum Analytics consumption trend

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Quantum Analytics: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
